scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key patterns: event.relation.data[event.unit], iterating relation.units, remote app data, own unit/app data. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: The gold standard mentions Relation.load() with dataclasses/Pydantic as a valid alternative — the agent omits this but doesn't fabricate anything. Minor: the agent doesn't mention the filter 'if unit.app is not self.app' when iterating relation.units, which is a subtle but real distinction. No fabricated APIs detected.
